args.query: SELECT book_id, title FROM books_info WHERE categories LIKE '%Children''s Books%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT book_id, title FROM books_info WHERE categories LIKE '%Children''s Books%';

args.query: SELECT purchase_id, rating, review_time FROM review WHERE review_time LIKE '%202[0-3]%' OR review_time LIKE '%202[0-3]%' OR review_time LIKE '%202[0-3]%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT purchase_id, rating, review_time FROM review WHERE review_time LIKE '%202[0-3]%' OR review_time LIKE '%202[0-3]%' OR review_time LIKE '%202[0-3]%';

args.query: SELECT purchase_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(review_time, -4) AS INTEGER) >= 2020 GROUP BY purchase_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT purchase_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(review_time, -4) AS INTEGER) >= 2020 GROUP BY purchase_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.5;

result.preview: "No books categorized as 'Children's Books' have received an average rating of at least 4.5 based on reviews from 2020 onwards."
